conservative.name: Trick Shot
conservative.requirements: Ranged weapon equipped, target within long range. Light of sight to the target is NOT required, although the target's location must be known and a path to the target must exist

success.description: You ricochet your shot through an improvable series of turns and hit your target for normal damage

boon.description: You catch your opponent completely off-guard. He may not use Reactions to attack and his shield's soak value is ignored

bane.description: You damage an item along the path to the target (GM's choice)

reckless.name: Trick Shot
reckless.requirements: Ranged weapon equipped, target within long range. Line of sight to the target is NOT required, although the target's location must be known and a path to the target must exist

success.description: You ricochet your shot through an improvable series of turns and hit your target for normal damage

bane.description: You damage an item along the path to the target (GM's choice)
